title: Acceptance tests share a static server over the full dataset, not an empty-per-scenario system
evidence: src/test/java/com/soccer/mcp/acceptance/MatchQueriesAcceptanceTest.java:17 @BeforeAll static setUp() builds one shared BrazilianSoccerMcpServer loading all CSVs; ATDD prompt asks each scenario start from 'a running but empty system' sharing no data
suggestion: Either seed each scenario from a fixed minimal fixture, or document that read-only shared state preserves test independence

title: novo_campeonato dedup uses a hardcoded 2012 cutoff coupled to Brasileirao_Matches.csv coverage
evidence: src/main/java/com/soccer/mcp/service/DataLoader.java:100-121 — BRASILEIRAO_MATCHES_START_YEAR=2012 silently drops novo_campeonato rows >=2012; if Brasileirao_Matches.csv coverage differs, seasons could be lost or duplicated
suggestion: Derive the cutoff from the actual min season present in Brasileirao_Matches.csv, or dedup by match key
